## What
Brief description of the change.

## Why
The motivation. Link to any related issue with `Closes #123`.

## How
High-level approach and any notable implementation details.

## Testing
How you verified this works. Include commands run and results where helpful.

## Checklist
- [ ] Conventional commit title (`feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`, etc.)
- [ ] `cargo fmt && cargo clippy -- -D warnings && cargo test` pass
- [ ] `pnpm lint && pnpm test` pass
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `## [Unreleased]`
- [ ] Architecture or security docs updated if applicable
